name: build-apple-apps
description: Build, run, debug, profile, and ship Apple 27-era apps across macOS, iOS, iPadOS, watchOS, tvOS, and visionOS with Swift, SwiftUI, Xcode 27, and XcodeBuildMCP.

interface.shortDescription: Build and debug Apple 27 SwiftUI apps across macOS, iOS, watchOS, and more
interface.longDescription: JStar's personal Apple 27-ready build plugin for verifying Xcode 27 toolchains, building and running Apple apps, using XcodeBuildMCP, shaping SwiftUI and Liquid Glass surfaces, adding App Intents and Foundation Models features, localizing and accessibility-testing apps, profiling performance and memory, and handling Apple signing and distribution workflows.
defaultPrompt: Build, debug, or modernize an Apple 27 SwiftUI app with Xcode 27 proof.
